faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Have a question? We have the answer.
faq.q1: Does HOLO TUTO replace the teacher?
faq.a1: No. HOLO TUTO acts as a complementary support at home. It helps the child with their homework but does not replace the teacher's pedagogical role.
faq.q2: Is it suitable for primary and secondary school?
faq.a2: Yes. HOLO TUTO is designed for students from Year 1 to Year 10 (ages 6 to 15). Content and interface automatically adapt to the child's level.
faq.q3: Does the AI simply give out the answers?
faq.a3: No. HOLO TUTO guides thinking step by step, never giving the answer directly. It asks questions, rephrases and encourages the child to find the answer themselves.
faq.a4: Yes. A simple parent dashboard lets you track completed exercises, subject-by-subject progress, and any blockers your child may have.
faq.q5: Is it compatible with the Quebec school curriculum?
faq.a5: Yes. HOLO TUTO is aligned with French-language school programmes, including the Quebec and North American context.
faq.q6: Can I request a demo or trial?
faq.a6: Yes. You can start a free 14-day trial with no credit card, or request a personalised demo for your school or family.
